summary: Validated full WhatsApp module (Fase 1, text-only) end-to-end. Backend: 11 unit + 9 e2e API tests = 20/20 PASS (config mask + secret preservation, preview OS/PED, send disabled returns 'desativado', send with active+bogus evolution provider returns success=false and persists FAILED log, /logs lists entries, tables auto-created). Frontend: /whatsapp-config loads, all 3 provider chips work, docs swap per provider, toggle + save shows success, secrets show '••••• (mantém o salvo — digite p/ alterar)'. OS-form (?os=7) and Pedido-form (?pedido=1) render WA buttons (testID whatsapp-btn-OS, whatsapp-btn-PED). Modal opens with Enviar/Histórico tabs (wa-tab-send, wa-tab-history). Preview fills phone (E.164) and message correctly (OS includes 'Ordem de Serviço: Nº 7', vehicle, série; PED includes 'Pedido de Venda: Nº 1'). Send with active config + invalid provider returns friendly error 'Evolution falha de comunicação' and creates a FAILED log entry visible in Histórico tab with red dot, timestamp, provider 'evolution', and error message. PED phone normalized from '97252487' → '+5597252487' (E.164 valid). State preserved: WhatsApp config disabled and Oficina=false restored after tests.
critical_code_review_comments: services/whatsapp/service.py:148 — retry loop calls time.sleep inside asyncio.to_thread; OK for thread pool, but consider exposing MAX_RETRIES/RETRY_BACKOFF as config (non-blocking).
providers.py:67/99/133 — provider HTTP calls have no proxy support; if customer infra requires outbound proxy, will fail silently into FAILED log (acceptable for Fase 1).
seed_data_creation: Temporarily enabled Oficina=true in controle_configuracao to allow OS #7 to appear; restored to false at the end. Toggled WhatsApp config enabled=true during tests; restored to enabled=false. Created 3 FAILED log entries for OS #7 and 1 FAILED log for PED #1 in whatsapp_send_log (expected as part of test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp config currently disabled in DB. Re-enable via POST /api/whatsapp/config if needed. Oficina=false restored. Frontend route params: /os-form?os=<codigo> (NOT ?codigo=), /pedido-form?pedido=<num>. /whatsapp-config is reachable directly via Configurações → Administração → WhatsApp.
